# Carat Capital

> The trade paper of the jewelry world — original, sourced daily reporting on diamonds, gold and precious metals, colored gemstones, watches, jewelry auctions, and jewelry retail and technology. Published at https://caratcapital.org. All articles are original writing with named, linked sources; prices are dated and indicative.

## The paper
- [Front page](https://caratcapital.org/): today's edition, the wire, and the live price tape
- [The Record](https://caratcapital.org/the-record.html): a dated, sourced week-by-week chronicle of the industry
- [The Almanac](https://caratcapital.org/almanac.html): the quarter's key numbers in sourced tables (metals, exports, prices, auctions, retail)
- [The Field Guide](https://caratcapital.org/field-guide.html): plain-language introduction to how the jewelry trade works
- [About & editorial standards](https://caratcapital.org/about.html)
- [RSS feed](https://caratcapital.org/feed.xml)
- [Morning Brief newsletter](https://caratcapital.beehiiv.com): free daily email, 06:30 ET

## The six desks
- [Diamonds](https://caratcapital.org/diamonds.html): the stone that runs on trust
- [Gold & Metals](https://caratcapital.org/gold-metals.html): the metal beneath every margin
- [Colored Gemstones](https://caratcapital.org/gemstones.html): supply lines drawn in emerald, ruby and sapphire
- [Watches](https://caratcapital.org/watches.html): haute horlogerie, priced by the second
- [Auctions & Estates](https://caratcapital.org/auctions.html): where the trade marks itself to market
- [Retail & Technology](https://caratcapital.org/retail-tech.html): the counter, rebuilt for the next generation

## Recent articles
- [Down 3.4% in a war week: gold's oldest rule just broke](https://caratcapital.org/a-war-premium-inverts.html): Spot gold closed Friday at $3,985.80 — its worst week in six — while airstrikes on Iran entered a sixth day. December rate-hike odds hit 73%
- [£105 million in, £7.8 million out: Audemars Piguet's British paradox](https://caratcapital.org/a-ap-105-million-paradox.html): AP's UK sales jumped 29% in 2025 — nearly double their 2022 level — while operating profit slipped 3% to £7.8 million. The new Manchester AP
- [Serial 022 leaves the safe: the first Résonance ever sold heads to Geneva](https://caratcapital.org/a-serial-022-comes-to-market.html): One owner, 27 years, a serial number chosen to match his birth date. Phillips will offer F.P. Journe Chronomètre à Résonance no. 022/99R — a
- [Rolex, rejected: 38% fail one marketplace's inspection](https://caratcapital.org/a-the-thirty-eight-percent-problem.html): Bezel turns away 38% of the Rolex watches submitted to its authenticators — against 13% for Omega, 6% for Tudor and 5% for Cartier. Rejected
- [Seventy dollars to Southampton: the jewelry trade pitches its summer tent](https://caratcapital.org/a-seventy-dollars-to-southampton.html): The Hamptons Jewelry Show returns July 23–26 — 36,000 square feet at the Southampton Fairgrounds, a $200 opening preview, $70 day passes, an
- [Fifty years on Forty-Seventh: a dealer opens the books](https://caratcapital.org/a-fifty-years-on-forty-seventh.html): Jeff Pancis walked into New York's Diamond District in 1976 and never left. His memoir 'Unveiling Rarities' covers five decades of stones, h
- [Seven hundred members, 47 countries: color gets a new chief](https://caratcapital.org/a-color-gets-a-chief.html): Brandee Dallow — De Beers, Rio Tinto Diamonds, Grandview Klein, the Women's Jewelry Association — took over July 6 as CEO of the Internation
- [Two hundred pieces, $250: Guess lets a machine draw its watch](https://caratcapital.org/a-guess-lets-the-machine-draw.html): The AI Venix — a 42mm tonneau in printed plastic, quartz inside, 200 pieces, web-only — is the first fashion watch to sell its AI-generated 
- [Penny gets the nod: De Beers' old boss becomes its likeliest buyer](https://caratcapital.org/a-penny-gets-the-nod.html): Anglo American names the Global Diamond Consortium, led by former De Beers chief executive Gareth Penny, preferred bidder for its 85% stake 
- [$4,000, touched and defended: gold closes the week at 4,031](https://caratcapital.org/a-gold-touches-four-thousand.html): August futures opened Friday at $3,980.10 and spot sank toward the line before buyers arrived; by the New York evening gold stood at $4,031.
- [One carat wakes up; the price stays in bed](https://caratcapital.org/a-one-carat-wakes-up.html): Rapaport's mid-July market comment finds one-carat demand picking up against falling supply — with prices unchanged. The premiums live in fa
- [4.3 percent: China misses its floor and Geneva checks its books](https://caratcapital.org/a-china-slows-to-four-three.html): Second-quarter GDP growth of 4.3% undershoots Beijing's 4.5–5% target, down from 5% in the first quarter. For Swiss watchmakers already nurs
- [22.6 percent: the shrinking price of Rolex's blessing](https://caratcapital.org/a-crown-premium-shrinks.html): Rolex's certified pre-owned program commanded roughly 40% over the open secondary market at launch in December 2022. The median premium is n
- [Ninety percent sold: the trophy watch market clears the room](https://caratcapital.org/a-ninety-percent-sold.html): Sotheby's watch sales are up 64% in the first half; its latest auction drew 1,850 bidders from 60 countries, 90% of lots sold and 45% beat t
- [Zero, effective immediately: India's jewelry enters Britain duty-free](https://caratcapital.org/a-zero-duty-day-one.html): The India–UK trade pact took force July 15, and the first zero-duty consignments of gold, silver and diamond jewelry shipped within a day. B
